steps.activity: Read today's lesson overview and goals aloud.
steps.hindi: आज के lesson का overview और goals को ज़ोर से पढ़ें।

steps.activity: Read the 8 lesson sections on self-introduction patterns.
Practice the formal 30-second introduction template 5 times aloud.
steps.hindi: Formal 30-second introduction template को 5 बार ज़ोर से बोलें।

steps.activity: Learn the first 20 vocabulary words for the day.
steps.hindi: आज के पहले 20 vocabulary words सीखें।
